examples:
Command Example
!secbi-get-incident-by-host host=www.smooto.com
Human Readable Output
### SecBI incident by host "www.smooto.com"
|FirstAppearance|Host|ID|Identity|InternalIp|LastAppearance|SIp|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2017-07-31 06:46:14 | pix.crp.education,
solutions.sante-corps-esprit.com,

name: secbi-get-incident-by-host

outputs.description: SecBI incident ID SecBI.Incident.Host SecBI incident host names

outputs.description: SecBI incident identities SecBI.Incident.InternalIp SecBI incident client internal IP addresses
